ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the portfolio */,
  "initial_balance" REAL /* Initial balance of the portfolio when it was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that made the trade */,
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the trade (buy or sell) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the trade (e.g., market order, stop-loss) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "wallet" REAL /* Wallet balance after the trade */,
  "trade_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, executed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trade_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_type_id") REFERENCES trade_types ("trade_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_cryptocurrency_id FOREIGN KEY ("cryptocurrency_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("cryptocurrency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_reason FOREIGN KEY ("reason") REFERENCES reasons ("reason_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_types" (
  "trade_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade type */,
  "trade_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade type (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the reason (e.g., buy market order, stop-loss) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reason */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reason was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reason was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (buy or sell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the position was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the position was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., trade, login) */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cryptocurrency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cryptocurrency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cryptocurrency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)
